prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a handsome young man with thick, slightly tousled dark brown hair, defined jawline, light stubble, sharp eyebrows, and deep brown eyes looking slightly off-camera with a calm, confident expression. He is standing outdoors in front of a modern luxury building with tall concrete columns and dark glass windows. He wears a perfectly fitted plain black crew-neck T-shirt that highlights his athletic, muscular physique, a minimalist silver chain necklace with a small rectangular pendant, and a black stainless-steel wristwatch. His arms are crossed naturally across his chest, emphasizing toned biceps and forearms. Warm golden-hour sunlight illuminates the left side of his face and body, creating soft highlights and realistic skin texture. Background features shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, keeping the architecture softly blurred.
